title: Opportunity Radar
search_focus: Configurable public opportunity radar for software engineering, data/AI, product, security, research, leadership, and adjacent roles.

alerts.title: Lead Product Marketing Manager, Pricing and Packaging
alerts.summary: GitLab is the intelligent orchestration platform for DevSecOps. GitLab enables organizations to increase developer productivity, improve operational efficiency, reduce security and compliance risk, and accelerate digital transformation. More than 50 million registered users and more than 50% of the Fortune 100* trust GitLab to ship better, more secure softw…
alerts.why_match: Matches Software Engineering, Product / Program Leadership, Cybersecurity / Trust; title relevance 75/100, profile relevance 72/100, location fit 100/100, freshness 100/100.
alerts.next_action: Prioritize: verify the posting is still open, then tailor your application around Software Engineering, Product / Program Leadership, Cybersecurity / Trust.
skillsets_to_build: System design, production debugging, API design, automated testing, and maintainable service ownership.
Roadmap framing, customer discovery, prioritization, metrics, stakeholder management, and crisp execution narratives.
Threat modeling, secure design review, exploitability triage, incident response, detection, and engineering-ready remediation.
certifications_to_consider: Cloud practitioner or associate developer certification only if the target role is cloud-heavy; otherwise prioritize a production-quality portfolio project.
Pragmatic Institute, Reforge, or equivalent product strategy coursework if the role expects formal product leadership vocabulary.
Choose role-aligned depth: OSCP/OSWE for offensive roles, CSSLP for secure SDLC, CISSP/CISM for leadership, or cloud security specialty for platform roles.
learning_gaps: Show one shipped project with tests, observability, deployment notes, and clear tradeoff decisions.
Prepare two stories showing ambiguous problem framing, prioritization, tradeoffs, launch, and measured outcome.
Keep public-safe case studies that show risk, proof, mitigation, and verification without exposing private details.
